title: SimpleMerchantEdit
description: Simple Minecraft Plugin to allow Editing Normal Villagers and Wandering Traders.
body:
SimpleMerchantEdit

## 🎯 Features - **Edit Trades** Shift + Right-Click a Villager or Wandering Trader to open the Trade Editor GUI. Modify, Add or Remove Trades and their Settings with just a few Clicks. #### - **Edit Villager Settings** Click on the Profession, XP or Type Icon in the Editor GUI to Edit the Villager. Easily change their Profession, Level and Appearance. #### - **Fully Vanilla Compatible** Edit normal Vanilla Merchants instead of only being able to modify custom ones (Like with Shopkeepers or VTE). Because of that Merchants keep their Trades, even after Removing the Plugin.
### Permissions: ``` simplemerchantedit.edit.villager (Default: false) - Allows Editing Villagers simplemerchantedit.edit.wandering_trader (Default: false) - Allows Editing Wandering Traders ``` ### Config: ``` edit-villagers - Toggle if Editing Villagers is Allowed edit-wandering-traders - Toggle if Editing Wandering Traders is Allowed ```
